items.name: Saturday Morning Trail Ride
items.description: A casual 15-mile trail ride through the park. All levels welcome. Bring water and a helmet!

items.name: Basic Bike Maintenance 101
items.description: Learn how to fix a flat, adjust your brakes, and lube your chain. Hands-on instruction by our mechanics.

items.name: Memorial Day Presale Drop
items.description: Biggest sale of the spring — up to 30% off bikes, gear, and accessories. Newsletter subscribers get early access.
